name: tour-validate
description: Iterate the tour proposal until structure, pricing arithmetic, and claim substantiation are all green.
fixPrompt: Fix the deliverable at {{deliverable.path}} so each failing check passes. required-sections: add the missing section and write its real content. figure-reconciliation: find which line item or total is wrong and correct the underlying number — do not fudge the total. claim-substantiation: source any superlative/percentage claim with a [^id] or (source: ...), or rephrase it without the trigger word. Edit only the proposal file.
guardrails: Never invent a supplier or source to satisfy claim-substantiation — if a claim has no source, the claim must be rephrased or removed, not the citation faked.
Never edit the Total line to make a reconcile block balance; correct the line items so the arithmetic is true.
Never delete a required section to pass the structure check — write the section.
onExhausted: Stop. Report which checks still fail and why the proposal cannot yet be substantiated (e.g., a price genuinely lacks a supplier quote). Recommend human review.
